name: Electrin
warning: This is a release candidate build. Download only from the official release page and test with small amounts only.

hero.title: Secure Rincoin Wallet Experience
hero.subtitle: Fast, reliable, and easy-to-use wallet software for the Rincoin community.

features.title: Safe
features.text: Your private keys are encrypted and never leave your computer.

features.title: Forgiving
features.text: Your funds can be recovered from a secret phrase.

features.title: Instant On
features.text: Electrin is fast, because it uses indexed servers for quick startup.

features.title: No Lock-In
features.text: You can export your private keys and use them in other Rincoin clients.

features.title: No Downtimes
features.text: Electrin can use multiple servers; if one is unavailable, you can switch servers.

features.title: Proof Checking
features.text: Electrin verifies your transaction history using SPV-style server proofs.

features.title: Cold Storage
features.text: Keep your private keys offline, and go online with a watching-only wallet.

features.title: Multisig
features.text: Split the permission to spend your Rincoin between several wallets.

features.title: Add-ons
features.text: Electrin supports plugins and optional integrations such as hardware wallets.

slides.title: Improve your Rincoin Experience
slides.description:
Electrin brings the classic Electrum wallet feel to Rincoin.
Fast startup, familiar workflow, and simple self-custody.

Built for Rincoin users who want a lightweight desktop wallet.

slides.title: Do not trust. Verify.
slides.description:
Electrin verifies your transactions
through SPV-style proofs and indexed servers.

Rincoin should stay open,
auditable and under your control.

slides.title: Cold Storage
slides.description:
Sign transactions from a computer that
is always offline. Broadcast them from
a machine that does not have your keys.

slides.title: Free and Decentralized
slides.description:
Electrin is open-source software.
Released under the MIT License.

Anyone can run a Fulcrum-rin server.
No single entity controls the network.

slides.title: Multi-Platform
slides.description:
Electrin is available for Linux, Windows,
and Android testing builds,
with familiar Electrum-style UX.

slides.title: Multisig
slides.description:
Split the permission
to spend your Rincoin
between several wallets.

sections.heading: About Electrin
paragraphs: Electrin is a lightweight, non-custodial Rincoin wallet forked from Electrum and adapted for the Rincoin network.
It is designed to preserve the classic Electrum workflow while integrating Rincoin-specific infrastructure.

sections.heading: Project status
paragraphs: Electrin 4.7.1rc1 is currently a release candidate build intended for wider testing before a stable release.
Use test-sized amounts, keep seed backups offline, and verify downloads from official release pages only.

sections.heading: Security model
paragraphs: Electrin is non-custodial: private keys are generated and stored locally on your device.
You are responsible for protecting your recovery phrase, wallet files, and device security posture.

sections.heading: Disclaimer
paragraphs: Software is provided as-is without warranty. You are responsible for securing backups and verifying downloads.
